author: aravind_srinivas
example_posts: Excited to share: Perplexity has hit a new milestone. What we're building is not just a search engine - it's an answer engine.
The future of search is conversational, cited, and instant. No more sifting through links. Just answers you can trust.
What we're building at Perplexity: a new way to access knowledge. The 10 blue links era is ending.
